steps: Launch the application and navigate to the homepage
Click on a new feature
Observe the instructions displayed
tests.expected_result: The system displays clear and concise instructions for the new feature

steps: Launch the application and navigate to the search bar
Enter a keyword and submit the search
Observe the search results
tests.expected_result: The system displays a list of relevant search results within 2 seconds

steps: Launch the application and navigate to the support section
Submit a support request
Wait for 1 hour and check for a response
tests.expected_result: The system responds with a solution or acknowledgement within 1 hour

steps: Launch the application and navigate to a feature that may encounter an error
Simulate an error
Observe the error message and troubleshooting options
tests.expected_result: The system displays a clear error message and provides troubleshooting options

steps: Launch the application and navigate to the feedback section
Submit a suggestion or idea
Observe the submission form and process
tests.expected_result: The system provides a clear and easy-to-use submission form for feedback

steps: Launch the application and navigate to the feedback section
Submit a suggestion or idea
Wait for a response and observe the feedback or implementation timeline
tests.expected_result: The system sends a response with feedback or an implementation timeline

steps: Launch the application and navigate to a feature that may encounter a technical issue
Simulate a technical issue
Observe the error message
tests.expected_result: The system displays a detailed and informative error message with troubleshooting options

steps: Launch the application and navigate to a feature that may experience slow performance
Simulate slow performance
Observe the system's optimization and notification
tests.expected_result: The system automatically optimizes performance and displays a notification when complete

steps: Launch the application and navigate to the homepage
Observe the interface and design
tests.expected_result: The system displays a clean, intuitive, and modern design that meets current design standards

steps: Launch the application and navigate to a feature
Interact with the feature
Observe the system's response and feedback mechanism
tests.expected_result: The system responds with a clear and intuitive feedback mechanism
